name: Tofu Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces tofu Italian style sausage, sliced into 1/2-inch pieces
1/2 to 1 teaspoon Mrs. Dash spicy blend
2 16-ounce tubs nonfat ricotta cheese blended with equivalent of 2 eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray one large or two medium baking pans with nonstick spray.
3. In a large pot, combine crushed tomatoes, tomato paste, water, and spices. Simmer over low heat for 10 minutes.
4. Add the sliced tofu sausage to the sauce and simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
5. Layer the lasagna in the prepared pan: start with a layer of sauce, followed by noodles, then half of the ricotta mixture, and repeat until all ingredients are used up, finishing with a layer of sauce and noodles on top.
6. Cover the pan with foil or lid.
7. Bake for 1 hour and 15 minutes, or until heated through.
8. Let stand for 15 to 30 minutes before serving. This makes serving easier.
